1840980.name: Cross of Auria - Eyes in the Frost
1840980.description:
Snowdrift Village is Cross of Auria's first free content DLC with challenges in the level 30-50 range.

This content pack includes:
• Access to Snowdrift Village from the area Northeast of Lvell. Comes complete with NPCs, a questline, exclusive enemies in random battles, and new gear sets on the loot table of the area.
• This free content pack comes as a stepping stone to future content to be added later.

Minimum in-game requirements:
• Ruby should have significantly powered teammates before attempting to traverse this area.
